crippling_strike.name: Crippling Strike
crippling_strike.description: Setup: A precise strike that hinders movement. Generates 15 Stamina and applies [Sluggish] for 5 ticks.

intervene.name: Intervene
intervene.description: Setup: Step between an ally and an enemy. Generates 10 Stamina and marks the target.

execute.name: Execute
execute.description: Payoff: A final, heavy strike intended to end the encounter. Deals Physical damage. Deals double total damage if target is below 25% HP.

retribution.name: Retribution
retribution.description: Payoff: Strike back with the force of your conviction. Deals Physical damage plus 50% of the damage you took in the last 2 ticks.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Defense/Disruption: Slam your shield into the target. Interrupts their current action and applies [Stunned] for 2 ticks.

brace.name: Brace
brace.description: Defense: Prepare for incoming impact. Grants [Braced] and [Shielded] for 6 ticks.

charge.name: Charge
charge.description: Mobility: Rush forward to a target. Applies [Staggered] on impact.

war_cry.name: War Cry
war_cry.description: Utility/Signature: A rallying cry that inspires allies. Increases all allies' Physical power by 20% in the room.

knight_physiology.name: Knight Physiology
knight_physiology.description: Passive: Stalwart Defender. You gain 15% increased Armor and 10% maximum Health.
